title: mysql:8.4 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
mecab
mecab-ipadic
mysql
[8.4.6-1]
- Rebase to 8.4.6

[8.4.5-1]
- Rebase to 8.4.5

rapidjson
[1.1.0-19]
- Rebuilt for IMA sigs, glibc 2.34, aarch64 flags
  Related: rhbz#1991688

[1.1.0-18]
- Remove gtest dependency and turn off tests
  Resolves: #1977656

[1.1.0-17]
- Rebuilt for RHEL 9 BETA on Apr 15th 2021. Related: rhbz#1947937

[1.1.0-16]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_34_Mass_Rebuild

[1.1.0-15]
- Add patch for C++20 support

[1.1.0-14]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_33_Mass_Rebuild

[1.1.0-13]
- Install pkg-config and cmake files to arched location
- Build documentation as noarch

[1.1.0-12]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_32_Mass_Rebuild

mecab
mecab-ipadic
mysql
[8.4.6-1]
- Rebase to 8.4.6

[8.4.5-1]
- Rebase to 8.4.5

rapidjson
[1.1.0-19]
- Rebuilt for IMA sigs, glibc 2.34, aarch64 flags
  Related: rhbz#1991688

[1.1.0-18]
- Remove gtest dependency and turn off tests
  Resolves: #1977656

[1.1.0-17]
- Rebuilt for RHEL 9 BETA on Apr 15th 2021. Related: rhbz#1947937

[1.1.0-16]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_34_Mass_Rebuild

[1.1.0-15]
- Add patch for C++20 support

[1.1.0-14]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_33_Mass_Rebuild

[1.1.0-13]
- Install pkg-config and cmake files to arched location
- Build documentation as noarch

[1.1.0-12]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_32_Mass_Rebuild
